_comment: Authoritative external baseline for context vs the news-corpus dashboard. GLOBAL headline + edition growth series and SECTOR projections are from the Global Status of CCS 2025 report (exec-summary graphic + GCCSI press release, retrieved 2026-07-08; global totals triple-confirmed). REGIONAL facility counts & targets are from the Global Status of CCS 2024 flagship (the latest edition with a verifiable regional breakdown in the CO2CRC GCCSI library at 03-GCCSI-publications/Global-Status-Report-6-November.pdf), data as of 24 July 2024, §4 Regional Overviews pp.32-55, page-cited per region. GCCSI reports regional FACILITY COUNTS + targets, not a per-region Mtpa capacity table (capacity aggregates are global-only + per flagship project), so counts are used for the regional view. Refresh when the GSR 2025 regional chapters become available locally.
source_global: Global CCS Institute — Global Status of CCS 2025 (“Staying the Course”)
source_regional: Global CCS Institute — Global Status of CCS 2024 (“Collaborating for a Net-Zero Future”), §4 Regional Overviews, data as of 24 Jul 2024

regions.note: GSR2024 p32: 27 operating across US/Canada/Brazil (US leads with 19), 310 in construction or early/advanced development. US 45Q + BIL/IRA; nearly US$2.2bn awarded/negotiating for carbon management + US$8bn for H2 hubs; Canada carbon price CA$80→170/t by 2030.

regions.target: EU NZIA 50 Mtpa CO₂ injection capacity by 2030
regions.note: GSR2024 p46,p50: 5 operating, 10 in construction; 191 commercial projects operating/in development (+62% YoY). UK £21.7bn over 25 yrs for 2 clusters; EU Innovation Fund €4bn; 14 cross-border PCIs/PMIs.

GSR2024 p39,p40: 1 operating (Gorgon, ~1.6 Mtpa stored at Barrow Is), 4 in construction. Japan exploring 9 CCS networks (US$130bn GX bond, 20% to CCS); Malaysia/Indonesia/Australia developing storage; Indonesia Java Sea hub US$2bn.

GSR2024 p43,p45 (separate chapter): 6 of 47 first-batch Advanced/Low-carbon Tech projects are CCUS-related. Huaneng 1.5 Mtpa — world's largest power-station CCUS (Gansu); 200 ktpa oxyfuel cement (Shandong) — world's largest in cement. SINOPEC megatonne project operating since 2022.

regions.target: Saudi 44 Mtpa by 2035; UAE/ADNOC 10 Mtpa by 2030; MEA pipeline ≥65 Mtpa by 2035
regions.note: GSR2024 p52,p54: 3 operating, 6 in construction. Saudi Aramco target 44 Mtpa by 2035; ADNOC 10 Mtpa by 2030, net-zero ops 2045, US$23bn decarbonisation budget (Habshan + Al Reyadah operating). Kenya/Egypt/South Africa DAC & storage pilots.

caveat: GCCSI figures are the authoritative global project-pipeline baseline (operating + announced). Global headline + growth series are GSR 2025; regional facility counts & targets are GSR 2024 (latest edition with a verifiable regional breakdown in the library; data as of 24 Jul 2024). GCCSI uses facility counts + Mtpa targets by region, not this dashboard's recent-news-flow A$ lens — use it to sanity-check what the corpus is and isn't catching.
